capabilities.message: Resolved 5 named interface instance(s) through live CreateInterface calls.
Retained ELF symbol export is disabled by default; pass --symbols when investigating exported names.
Dumped every field and enum visible through live SchemaSystem metadata.
Verified CGameEntitySystem through GameResourceServiceClientV001+0x50 using live RTTI.
Emitted 28 native Linux target(s) from unique patterns and validated live KeyButton state objects.
Patterns are adapted from Osiris Linux MemoryPatterns (MIT); schema-reflected fields are still emitted from live SchemaSystem rather than duplicated here.

Osiris Linux does not define a local-pawn global pattern, and the historical a2x Linux dwLocalPlayerPawn rule does not match this supplied libclient.so. Derive the local pawn from dwLocalPlayerController + reflected m_hPlayerPawn through CGameEntitySystem.
Private globals are emitted only after live validation; signature-backed discoveries are marked in offsets metadata.
